page: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Famsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor operating at a base frequency of 3.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, but supports premium external storage options.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and PassMark CPU scores all placing in the top 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with cached small-block read operations and large-block write operations both reaching top-tier performance levels. Single-core performance, measured by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests, ranks in the top 25%. In terms of specific workloads, the server demonstrates top-tier efficiency in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, and Redis SET operations, which reached 135.23 million operations per second.

While the server excels in multi-threaded processing and memory bandwidth, single-threaded tasks such as gzip compression and bzip3 decompression perform in the middle 50% average tier. Additionally, large-model LLM inference prompt processing falls into the average tier, though text generation for medium and large models remains strong to top-tier. Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high multi-core throughput, this server is configured for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it provides 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding an 8.0 GB per core ratio. The server lacks local storage but is premium storage capable, and contains no GPUs. In benchmark testing, it delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and memory write bandwidth, alongside strong single-core and database execution capabilities. However, single-threaded compression tasks perform at average levels. This resource density and high multi-threaded throughput make the F64ams_v6 suitable for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and parallelized computing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 512 GB of RAM, and top-tier multi-core performance, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F64ams_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 512 GB of RAM for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-intensive server featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD EPYC cores and half a terabyte of RAM for demanding multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V74 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
Top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and software compilation performance
No local storage included, with support for premium external storage
Suited for database operations, memory-intensive applications, and parallel processing
